# HyperQueue job-list fixture

`hq-v0.26.2-job-list.json` has the literal `JobListDescription` JSON shape from
HyperQueue commit `dd15afd317f3f57cb70f16b51eba14013c63972b`, source lines
390-415. IDs, names, reasons, and states are synthetic; the six row keys, six
nested `task_stats` keys, JSON types, and nullability match that source.

The reviewed release archive SHA-256 is
`e15dae9113e1a307a97a66bfe90f74f78c6016239436b5d9f1e4efec480e84b5`.
